case_title: JARROD C CORNEHL VS. CHRISTIAN CHAUBARD

docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO DEBORAH ROBINSON, 2130 ADAMS AVE,SAN LEANDRO,CA.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
